name: ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation
title: ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation (Signal ObservedSignal, duration MinCycleTime, duration MaxCycleTime);
description: Checks the occurrences of a signal.
An event will be generated, if the time between two consecutive signal occurrences is out of the specified range.
Limit set to 0 is considered as "cycle time is undefined"; at least one limit has to be more than 0.

parameters.name: ObservedSignal
parameters.description: Signal to observe. It must exist in DB
